title: Radioactive End
description: It only turns End and its inhabitants from purple to green.
body:
# Requires for Best Experience

This texture pack requires the [Radioactive End - Datapack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/radioactive-end-datapack). If you don't want to install it, please disable End flashes for the best experience. However, the glasses and banners of End cities will remain magenta.

## Lore of Pack

Radioactivity in the Nether's basalt deltas spread beyond their boundaries due to an unexpected event, contaminating portals, Endermans, the End dimension, the Ender Dragon, Shulkers, and even the nearly extinct Endermite. It also turned the chorus fruits and End cities green. The last time this event occurred, the ancient End portals and the Enderman's eyes had turned green. The Enderman eventually eliminated the remnants of this event, but the same event occurred again on a larger scale.

Actually, it only turns the End and the portals green. Maybe this pack should just be called "Green End"?

## Returning Nether Portal and Nether Things Color to Original(From Green to Purple)

Copy the "**assets**" folder inside the "**For Purple Nether Things**" folder in the downloaded zip file to the main directory of the texture pack.
